message:
Rewrite DecodingText scramble effect, tune FrankenGlitch timing

DecodingText: Replace the framer-motion opacity+translateY fade-in with a real
character scramble animation using requestAnimationFrame. Characters progressively
resolve left-to-right from random digits into the final string. Layout stability
is guaranteed by an invisible ghost <span> that reserves the exact final text
dimensions while the visible text scrambles in an absolute-positioned overlay.
Numeric characters (0-9) are used for the scramble pool because they render
at consistent widths even in variable-width fonts, preventing jitter.

FrankenGlitch: Reduce frequency and duration of the random glitch effect to
make it feel more like a subtle ambient twitch than a constant distraction.
Random trigger threshold raised from 0.8 to 0.85 (15% → 15% chance per tick),
glitch duration shortened from 200-500ms to 150-350ms, and the check interval
widened from 2s to 3s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
